app.title: NIGHT SHIFT MARKET
bootstrap.subtitle: Building the market for your next shift...
menu.title:
Night Shift
Market
menu.description: Run a compact late-night market from a relaxed desktop view. Route deliveries, unpack stock and refill shelves without first-person pressure.
menu.info: The current prototype is a desktop stock-management slice: pan the camera, click boxes to route them into storage, unpack them, then refill the shelves.
menu.continue_hint: Continue unlocks after the first shift is started.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: These preferences persist immediately and are shared across every session.
pause.title: Shift Paused
pause.subtitle: Take a breath, tweak your settings or head back to the front menu. Your current shift progress has already been saved.
hud.controls_hint: WASD / Arrows: Pan camera   |   Mouse Wheel: Zoom   |   Left Click or E: Action   |   Right Click or F: Route box   |   Esc: Pause
objective.truck_arrival.title: Morning Delivery
objective.truck_arrival.detail: Wait for the delivery truck to finish parking at the loading lane.
objective.move_boxes_to_storage.title: Unload Boxes
objective.move_boxes_to_storage.detail: Click each delivery box to send it from the truck into the backroom storage zone.
objective.unpack_boxes.title: Unpack Deliveries
objective.unpack_boxes.detail: Open each box while it is inside storage to transfer products into player stock inventory.
objective.restock_shelves.title: Restock Shelves
objective.restock_shelves.detail: Click an empty shelf to move matching products from inventory onto it.
objective.morning_complete.title: Store Ready
objective.morning_complete.detail: Morning prep is complete. Shelves are stocked and the delivery truck has cleared the lane.
notification.click_box_to_route: Hover a delivery box and route it to storage.
notification.all_boxes_unpacked: All delivery boxes unpacked. Finish stocking the shelves.
notification.move_box_to_storage: Move the box into storage before unpacking it.
notification.box_already_unpacked: This box has already been unpacked.
notification.shelf_cannot_stock: {shelf} cannot be stocked from the current inventory.
notification.drop_box_before_stock: Drop the carried box before stocking a shelf.
notification.object_not_ready: This object is not ready for interaction.
notification.only_boxes_carried: Only delivery boxes can be carried right now.
product.sparkling_water.name: Sparkling Water 1L

product.sea_salt_chips.name: Sea Salt Chips
product.granola_bar.name: Hazelnut Granola Bar
product.green_apple.name: Green Apple
